dailyNews.title: European groups join aid convoy to Cuba amid crippling oil blockade
dailyNews.description: Millions have been plunged into darkness in Cuba as the US's total blockade has meant no fuel shipments in three months.

dailyNews.description: US counterterrorism chief Joe Kent has resigned over Washington’s war on Iran, saying he cannot support the conflict.

dailyNews.title: Blue state Dem candidate who made 'affordability' a key issue in campaign ripped for charging $13 for water
dailyNews.description: Rep. Raja Krishnamoorthi faced mockery after his Senate campaign charged supporters $13 for water at his election party, despite championing affordability.

dailyNews.title: Two dozen House Republicans go to war with Senate GOP over SAVE America Act
dailyNews.description: A group of House Republicans is putting Senate leadership on notice, vowing to "filibuster" all Senate measures until the Trump-backed SAVE America Act reaches the president's desk.

dailyNews.title: Genealogy boom exposes personal data scammers can exploit
dailyNews.description: Using genealogy websites can expose personal data that scammers use to target families, according to experts warning about privacy risks.

dailyNews.title: DNI Tulsi Gabbard says that Trump acted because he concluded the Iranian regime 'posed an imminent threat'
dailyNews.description: Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard stated in a post on X that President Donald Trump moved against Iran based on his conclusion that the regime "posed an imminent threat."

dailyNews.title: Trump resurfaces old tweet from intel official who resigned
dailyNews.description: President Trump pointed to a 2020 tweet by Joe Kent after Kent resigned from the position of National Counterterrorism Center director due to his opposition to the Iran war.

dailyNews.title: Oilers lose Leon Draisaitl for rest of regular season as playoffs approach
dailyNews.description: The Edmonton Oilers' hopes of making it to a third straight Stanley Cup final were thrown into flux as the team announced Leon Draisaitl will miss the rest of the regular season.

dailyNews.title: One little-known meeting helps decide what Americans can afford — and what they can’t

dailyNews.title: NCAA president on sports betting, prediction market concerns as March Madness gets underway

dailyNews.title: Iran strikes Israel overnight, Trump faces fallout of Joe Kent's resignation
dailyNews.description: Iran launched retaliatory strikes against Israel overnight as the war drags on. This comes as the Trump administration faces the fallout of Joe Kent's resignation as the director of the National Counterterrorism Center. CBS News' Jarred Hill reports.

dailyNews.title: Markwayne Mullin testifies at Senate confirmation hearing for DHS secretary
dailyNews.description: Watch live coverage as Sen. Markwayne Mullin, President Trump's pick to replace Kristi Noem as the secretary of the Department of Homeland Security, testifies before the Senate Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs Committee during his confirmation hearing. Lawmakers are expected to question Mullin on his priorities for DHS.

dailyNews.title: DHS nominee Markwayne Mullin gets Senate hearing Wednesday
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump tapped Sen. Markwayne Mullin, R-Okla., to replace Kristi Noem as the head of the Department of Homeland Security.

dailyNews.title: Cuba partially restores power as President Díaz-Canel vows ‘unyielding resistance’ to U.S. oil blockade
dailyNews.description: The communist-run island nation is thought to be facing its biggest test since the collapse of the Soviet Union amid a U.S. oil blockade.
